title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tech Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tech Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
jsonLd.skills: JavaScript, REST APIs, Python, Agile/Scrum, TypeScript, Node.js, SQL, Machine Learning
